title: Show in-progress congress sessions at top

log.context: Show in-progress congress sessions at top

Done. Here's what was changed:

**File:** `/home/clungus/work/hello-world/congress.html`, line ~897

The sort comparator in `loadSessionList()` was updated from a simple descending-by-number sort to a two-tier sort:
1. `deliberating` sessions get rank 0, everything else rank 1 — so active sessions float to the top
2. Within each tier, sessions are still ordered by session number descending

The existing pulsing yellow `.status-dot.deliberating` badge already provides the visual distinction, so n...(truncated)
